You can go through this and if there are any changes you can tell me.

prs.title: Added Script to fetch pdf from supabase and also get text from them i…
Implement integration controller for coding profiles
prs.body: This file implements various functions to sync and manage student coding profiles across multiple platforms including GitHub, LeetCode, Codeforces, CodeChef, and LinkedIn. It includes error handling and validation for each integration.

prs.title: Implement job recommendations and dashboard stats
Implement coding profile creation and retrieval
Implement authentication for students and recruiters
Implement application tracking controller with CRUD operations
setup prisma and schema
prs.body: Prisma Integration Update — Added full support for Prisma schema and client explanation. CodeNarrator can now parse schema.prisma, detect models, relations, enums, and generate clear, structured English explanations for your database architecture. This makes backend documentation easier and helps developers understand data flow across the project.

prs.title: Update index.html
prs.body: I have updated background colour, font colour, box-shadow, button, underlining, colour of line, box colour, floating image colour.Tried to make your site look more interesting and interactive.
